meaning: n.结果,效果,作用,影响,(在视听方面给人流下的)印象vt.招致,实现,达到(目的等)
examples: His voice had an almost hypnotic effect.
His words had exactly the opposite effect.
The effect is almost impossible to describe.
An optical laser reads the transparency and creates a wobbly, out-of-tune, almost eerie-sounding keyboard effect.
This will typically tend to have a knock on effect on lowering annuity rates.
